Class Umpire

java.lang.Object
Umpire
public class Umpire extends Object

This class is responsible for collecting the number(s) from the Guesser and Players + Announces the results. It also compares the Players numbers with the Guesser's number and declares the winner(s) of the game. (Yes,there can be multiple winners in the game).

It achieves this by making calls to the Guesser and Player classes to collect the numbers and then compares them to declare the winner(s).

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    (package private) int
    numGuesser
    Collects the number guessed by the Guesser/The value returned by the Guesser.guessingNum() method.
    (package private) int
    numPlayer1
    Collects the number predicted by the Player 1/The value returned by the Player.predictNum() method in the First call.
    (package private) int
    numPlayer2
    Collects the number predicted by the Player 2/The value returned by the Player.predictNum() method in the Second call.
    (package private) int
    numPlayer3
    Collects the number predicted by the Player 3/The value returned by the Player.predictNum() method in the Third call.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Umpire()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    (package private) void
    collectingNumFromGusser()
    This method creates an object of the Guesser class and calls the Guesser.guessingNum() method to collect the number guessed by the Guesser and assigns the number to numGuesser variable.
    (package private) void
    collectingNumFromPlayers()
    This method creates an object of the Player class and calls the Player.predictNum() method multiple times to collect the number predicted by the Players and assigns the number to numPlayer1,numPlayer2, and numPlayer3 variables respectively.
    (package private) void
    comparing()
    Compares the number guessed by the Guesser with the numbers predicted by each player and declares the winnner(s) of the game.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Field Details

    • numGuesser

      int numGuesser
      Collects the number guessed by the Guesser/The value returned by the Guesser.guessingNum() method.

    • numPlayer1

      int numPlayer1
      Collects the number predicted by the Player 1/The value returned by the Player.predictNum() method in the First call.

    • numPlayer2

      int numPlayer2
      Collects the number predicted by the Player 2/The value returned by the Player.predictNum() method in the Second call.

    • numPlayer3

      int numPlayer3
      Collects the number predicted by the Player 3/The value returned by the Player.predictNum() method in the Third call.

  • Constructor Details

    • Umpire

      public Umpire()

  • Method Details

    • collectingNumFromGusser

      void collectingNumFromGusser()
      This method creates an object of the Guesser class and calls the Guesser.guessingNum() method to collect the number guessed by the Guesser and assigns the number to numGuesser variable.

    • collectingNumFromPlayers

      void collectingNumFromPlayers()
      This method creates an object of the Player class and calls the Player.predictNum() method multiple times to collect the number predicted by the Players and assigns the number to numPlayer1,numPlayer2, and numPlayer3 variables respectively.

    • comparing

      void comparing()
      Compares the number guessed by the Guesser with the numbers predicted by each player and declares the winnner(s) of the game.

      If no player is able to predict the number guessed by the Guesser, then the Guesser is declared the winner. This method also handles the case where there can be multiple winners(Uses nested if-else statements to check for multiple winners).
